prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约56478名、55500名、91868名、65074名、66470名。2023年出现异常大幅后移（91868名），可能与当年省控线波动及专业冷 热分化有关；2024年迅速回升至65074名，2025年基本持平于66470名，近两年趋于稳定，2025年基准位次约66470名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年185人 、2022年194人、2023年180人、2024年188人、2025年214人，呈波动上升趋势。2026年计划大幅扩招至256人，较2025年增加42人，增幅约19.6%，为近年最大扩招幅度，显 著增加录取机会，预计将推动最低位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜排名2026年约第131位，近年排名在127–136之间波动， 整体稳定在中后段211水平；该校在声誉评价文件中未出现，说明近年无明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第72位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约38万， 短视频曝光量处于211高校中下游水平，报考关注度平稳。历史投档异常记录中亦未出现该校，录取过程正常；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无A-及以上等级学科 ，学科实力在211高校中相对一般，缺乏顶尖学科的强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机、电气、机械等工科为主，近年工科类专业社会热度整体平稳偏 暖；河北省2026年高考总报名人数约60.98万，较2025年（约60.68万）微增约0.5%，物理类考生估算约36.5万，竞争程度略有上升；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分持 续上升至2025年459分，反映整体竞争加剧趋势；新疆大学位于乌鲁木齐市，距河北省较远，属于西部偏远地区高校，对河北考生存在一定地域偏好劣势，可能 抑制部分报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次66470名、2026年大幅扩招约19.6%的显著利好、考生总数微增及省控线上升带来的竞争加剧、地域偏远和学科实力一般 的轻微负面效应，扩招是影响2026年位次的最关键因素，预计最低位次将明显后移。预测2026年物理类最低位次约74197名，区间73697–74697名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 56478, 55500, 91868, 65074, and 66470 respectively. The abnormal large backward shift in 2023 (91868) may be related to provincial control line fluctuations and cold/hot major differentiation; it quickly recovered to 65074 in 2024 and remained basically stable at 66470 in 2025, with the last two years trending stable, and the 2025 baseline ranking approximately 66470. The university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 185 in 2021, 194 in 2022, 180 in 2023, 188 in 2024, and 214 in 2025, showing a fluctuating upward trend. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 256, an increase of 42 from 2025, about 19.6%, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing admission opportunities and expected to push the minimum ranking notably backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 131st, fluctuating between 127 and 136 in recent years, overall stable at the mid-to-late 211 level. The university does not appear in reputation evaluation documents, indicating no significant positive or negative public opinion events in recent years. Its Douyin heat total ranking is 72nd, rated as 'average', with comprehensive heat about 380,000, short video exposure at the mid-to-lower level among 211 universities, and stable application attention. Historical abnormal admission records also do not include this university, indicating normal admission process. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University has no A- or above disciplines, with relatively average discipline strength among 211 universities, lacking strong attraction from top disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as computer science, electrical engineering, and mechanical engineering. In recent years, the social popularity of engineering majors has been generally stable and slightly warm. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination takers is about 609,800, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (about 606,800). Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 365,000, with slightly increased competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has continuously risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting an overall intensifying competition trend. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Hebei Province, belonging to a western remote area university, which has a certain geographical preference disadvantage for Hebei candidates, potentially suppressing some application willingness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 66470, the significant benefit of a large expansion of about 19.6% in 2026, the slight increase in total examinees and rising provincial control line leading to intensified competition, and the minor negative effects of remote geography and average discipline strength, the expansion is the most critical factor affecting the 2026 ranking. It is expected that the minimum ranking will notably shift backward. The predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is approximately 74197, with a range of 73697–74697.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 8723, 7880, 9981, 8851, and 9855 respectively. Overall, they fluctuated between 7880 and 9981, with the highest ranking in 2022 (7880) and the lowest in 2023 (9981). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9855, showing a slight backward trend in recent 3 years. Enrollment plans for History Category: 20 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 35 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 34, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.86%, leading to a slight tightening of admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 131st on the Soft Science main ranking. It is a mid-to-late tier 211 university with a stable level. Its reputation is stable with no major public opinion incidents. Its popularity on Douyin is average, with low application attention. There are no abnormal historical admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, so its disciplinary appeal is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, and Ideological and Political Education have stable popularity. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province for 2026 is about 245,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025 (243,700). The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, indicating intensifying competition. Xinjiang University is located in a remote western region, which may have a certain regional preference disadvantage for Hebei History Category examinees, potentially affecting application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9855, the tightening effect of a slight enrollment reduction of about 2.86% in 2026, the slight increase in total examinees and rising provincial control line indicating intensified competition, and the slight negative effects of remote location and average disciplinary strength, the enrollment reduction and intensified competition jointly push the ranking forward, but regional factors partially offset this. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 9736, with a range of 9236–10236.
